text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...It's as I suspected. My technique has lost its
edge. The additional weight may have increased
my raw power, but by the same token, my speed
has suffered.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is a grave situation. I must return to my
former weight as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hi there, Yaeno. I see that you're training as hard
as I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Say, do you happen to have some free time later?
I baked some rice crackers, so I was thinking we
could enjoy them together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I even made some special spicy ones for you!
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What consideration! Thank you. I'm looking
forward to sampling them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay then, I'll drop by later!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I'll not be the one to put a frown on that face.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I cannot refuse Chiyono O's kind offer. I'll just
have to work off any calories contained within
those rice crackers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With unwavering determination, Yaeno Muteki
successfully achieves her target weight.
